ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of the size (e.g., 8-10, 10-12) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing (e.g., T-Shirt, Dress, Jeans) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size measurement (e.g., US, UK, EU, CM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size is being converted (e.g., UK, CA / US, EU) */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* Converted size value for the region */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing (e.g., T-Shirt, Dress, Jeans) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "size_type_from" TEXT /* Type of size measurement from which the conversion is made */,
  "size_type_to" TEXT /* Type of size measurement to which the conversion is made */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor used for conversion (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., T-Shirt, Dress, Jeans) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the item is intended (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "preferred_region" TEXT /* Preferred region for size conversion (e.g., UK, CA / US, EU) */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred category of clothing (e.g., T-Shirt, Dress, Jeans) */,
  "preferred_gender" TEXT /* Preferred gender of clothing (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchased item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_preferences ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
